title: lepidium englerianum
intro: Lepidium englerianum, also known as Engler's cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Lepidium englerianum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in various herbal preparations, including tinctures, capsules, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
